title: I am god's eyes / I am a savage — 11-line ladder manifesto (Apr 14, 2026)
html:
I am god's eyes / I am a savage — 11-line ladder manifesto

Source: 2026-04-14 Apple Note titled "Me." Eleven lines, first-person declarative, 12 days before vault creation — the most recent fully-polished manifesto specimen in the corpus.

TL;DR

  • "I am a Gods eyes / I am a savage / I will do what ever it takes / I am a colorful octopus / I am abundance / I walk with bearing all the weight light on my feet / I am love / I love / I will help my family / I will make myself proud / You are him you can do it" — the entire 11-line note.
  • Three movements: (1) identity claims (god's eyes, savage, octopus, abundance, love), (2) action commitments (do whatever it takes, walk light on my feet, help my family, make myself proud), (3) closing self-pep ("you are him you can do it").
  • "I am god's eyes" directly extends the "walk with God's eyes" concept Yahir's been using since at least the March 2025 heavy life note — but compressed from "walk with" to "I am" (full identification, not borrowed posture).
  • Family commitment is a top-tier line — "I will help my family" — this is Yahir's direct re-articulation of the mom house by the river / family as runway motivator.
  • Sits at the top of the manifesto style note arc: most recent, most polished, most syncretic — pulls vocabulary from the Shanghai 14 bullet, the void manifesto, and the killer manifesto all in one document.

Key quote

"I walk with bearing all the weight light on my feet."

Pattern observed

The closing line — "You are him you can do it" — switches from first-person to second-person within a single note. This switch is the manifesto's own self-correction mechanism: the I-am declarations stack high, then the final line addresses the saying-I from the outside, validating it. I am all these things; you (the saying-I) can do it.

The "colorful octopus" line is the most idiosyncratic image in the corpus — likely a self-coined symbol for the multi-armed multi-project mode Yahir's operating in (Rankett + NaviWell + Brotein + family-care simultaneously). Worth promoting to its own concept stub if it recurs. Tracking incidentally only for now.

The "I will make myself proud" line is the fraud fear note's positive complement — same self-as-judge mechanism, but framed as aspiration instead of avoidance.

Open questions

  • Is the "colorful octopus" image new here, or borrowed from a podcast / book / earlier note?
  • The 12-day gap before vault creation suggests this note may have been part of what triggered the vault project — was it?
  • Does the next manifesto in the sequence (post-vault) escalate again, or does this become the resting plateau of the identity arc?
